response.overview: This film chronicles the essential rhythms of Chesapeake Bay: wind, tides, migrations of tundra swans, Monarch butterflies, shorebirds and eels.  These ancient migrations, annual rituals repeated repeated for millennia, weave a tapestry that enriches our lives and oblige Chesapeake dwellers to maintain our hugely important way station in this vaster scheme of comings and goings. The film will convey the beauties and mysteries of the fundamental, elemental Chesapeake.
response.title: Chesapeake Rhythms
